name: ffprofanity
description: Firefox WebExtension that detects profanity in subtitles, mutes audio, and displays censored subtitles

scripts.build:esbuild: esbuild src/background/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=esm --platform=browser && esbuild src/content/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild src/options/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/options.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild src/popup/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup.js --format=iife --platform=browser
